# Drunkards.in — llms.txt
# India's home bar authority: cocktails, spirits, and buying guides

## About
Drunkards.in is an India-focused cocktail and spirits education site.
It covers cocktail recipes, spirits guides, home bar setup, buying advice,
and practical tools for home bartenders in India.

## Content
- /cocktails/ — Cocktail recipes with ratios, techniques, and variations
- /spirits/ — Spirits guides covering gin, whisky, rum, vodka, tequila, vermouth
- /home-bar/ — Home bar setup guides, tool recommendations, glassware
- /guides/ — Deep-dive educational guides for beginners and enthusiasts
- /india-picks/ — India-specific buying guides with INR pricing
- /tools/ — Interactive calculators: party planner, ABV calculator, ratio calculator

## Audience
Home bartenders in India, cocktail enthusiasts, people setting up a home bar,
gift buyers looking for spirits recommendations

## Language
English, with India-specific context (INR pricing, India-available brands)

## Sitemap
https://drunkards.in/sitemap.xml
